description: Style Note enamor's range of flirty and pretty nightdresses are quite impressive. Capturing the mood of the season in the colours, fabric and designs, your beauty sleep is is made even more comfortable by this range. Enjoy the obvious cutesy look of this pink nightdress. Product Details Purple chemise, has a V neckline, adjustable spaghetti straps, lace detail on the bra cups which extends at the back with a sash to tie it and an elasticated neckline at the back Material and Care Fabric: 97% polyester and 3% spandex Trims: 86% nylon and 14% elastic Hand wash Do not bleach Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size L
